creator: mjs@staff.onthenet.com.au
text:
Hi,

I have reviewed the patch and it looks fine, please go ahead and commit it.

Thanks,

Mitchell

From: "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
To: <mjs@bur.st>
Cc: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>
Sent: Thursday, March 26, 2009 9:25 AM
Subject: Re: ports/133075: [PATCH] Update www/grails to v1.1


> Maintainer of www/grails,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/133075 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133075
